case_title: LUNARDI, KENNETH vs. DALEY, JAMES ALLAN et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-11-1996, CONTINUED TO OCT-10-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR FURTHER CASE STATUS REPORT: FOR A DETAILED DECLARATION RE: UNINSURED MOTORIST STATUS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DECLARATION OF RAYMOND GLICKMAN (ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUNARDI, KENNETH AS TO DEFENDANT DALEY, JAMES ALLAN DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-09-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-12-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-20-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-07-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON DEC-07-1995, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND AS TO WHY THERE WAS A FAILURE TO FILE AN "UNINSURED MOTORIST" REPORT. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. HEARING SET FOR JAN-11-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-11-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE CONTINUED OSC FOR "UNINSURED MOTORIST" STATUS REVIEW. (CONT'D FROM 1/11/96) HEARING SET FOR MAR-13-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-13-1996, CONTINUED TO JUL-11-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS HEREBY DISCHARGED. PLAINTIFF IS TO FILE A DECLARATION DESCRIBING PROSECUTION OF UNINSURED MOTORIST CASE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
